subject: GRB030629 triangulation (Konus-Wind -- Helicon annulus)
body:
S. Golenetskii, E. Mazets, V. Pal'shin, and D. Frederiks on behalf
of Konus-Wind and Helicon/Coronas-F teams,

T. Cline on behalf of the Konus GRB team, report:

A short hard GRB030629 was observed by Konus-Wind at 03:26:44.100
and by Helicon/Coronas-F at 03:26:40.696

We have triangulated it to a preliminary annulus:
RA(2000) = 257.150 deg,
Decl(2000) = -21.445 deg,
Radius = 42.998 +/- 0.866 degrees (3 sigma ).
